prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a log-normal random walk model using historical data for AMGN. Using approximately the last 250 trading days, the daily mean log return (drift) was estimated at 0.0003 and the daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) at 0.0107. These parameters were extrapolated over 7 days to forecast the future price distribution. The point estimate represents the expected value of the price in 7 days, considering both drift and volatility. The confidence intervals indicate the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given probability, calculated using the projected 7-day drift and volatility. The current price of $379.33 serves as the starting point for this projection.
